## OEM Feature Description

Describe the behavior in the original MIDI Captain firmware.

---

## Current Behavior in MIDI Captain MAX

Explain what currently happens and what is missing.

---

## Expected Behavior

Describe how MIDI Captain MAX should behave to match OEM functionality.

---

## Example Use Case

Explain how this feature would be used in practice.

---

## References

Links to documentation, screenshots, or videos showing the OEM behavior.
